visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with styled brown hair and a dark grey long-sleeved shirt stands in a modern kitchen. He is holding a small white pouch. In the foreground, another man in a beige t-shirt is sitting at a large wooden table, eating from a takeout box with chopsticks. The lighting is bright and even. (2) The background man puts on dark sunglasses and leans toward the camera, presenting the white pouch directly to the lens. His expression is energetic and promotional. The foreground man remains focused on his meal. (3) The visual style shifts to grayscale. The man with sunglasses points a black marker toward the head of the man who is eating. The eating man looks up with a confused or blank expression. Large yellow variety text appears at the bottom. (4) The scene returns to full color. The man with sunglasses waves the pouch enthusiastically toward the camera while smiling widely. The foreground man is still visible, appearing slightly embarrassed or indifferent.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 很多人都在問. (2) [Subtitle]: 嘎哥維持身材的小秘密. (3) [Subtitle]: 因為我餐前都有吃絲蓓緹. (4) [Variety]: 他沒吃. (5) [Subtitle]: 絲蓓緹. [Slogan]: 嘎哥優惠團購中.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator (Cai Aga) in the background, 1 staff member/friend eating in the foreground.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main character has brown hair, wears a dark grey sweatshirt and sunglasses, and displays high-energy gestures.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, modern kitchen area with white and light wood cabinets, a white refrigerator, a water dispenser, and a large wooden dining table.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male speaker introduces a topic with high energy and a fast speech rate, sounding friendly and authoritative. The background is quiet, focused on the vocal clarity. (2) A sudden hard cut introduces high-tempo electronic dance music with a strong, driving beat. A female vocal track in a different language (Cantonese pop style) enters the mix at a high volume. (3) The energetic music continues, now layered with background cheering and shouting sounds, creating a sense of celebration or comedic chaos. The acoustic spectrum is bright and saturated with percussion and high-frequency vocal content.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Product Introduction -> Comparison -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a comedic endorsement for a weight management supplement called Svelty. It uses a contrasting narrative where the main creator (Cai Aga) claims the product is his 'secret' while mocking his companion for not using it, aiming to generate sales through a limited-time group buy offer.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The speaker explicitly names the product '絲蓓緹' (Svelty), shows it to the camera, and provides a 'group buy' call to action.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes a classic social media marketing 'hook' with variety-show editing style to keep viewers engaged for the short duration.
